name: PostV1CryptoDepositAddresses
description: Generate Crypto Deposit Address (USDT/USDC) via CaaS (Notus/BlindPay Account Abstraction)

api_key.description: Ashar Management API key (Bearer token) — used to resolve the user identity

user_id.description: ID do usuario no CaaS para quem gerar o endereco de deposito

chain.description: Blockchain network for the deposit (lowercase). EVM chains use Notus ERC-4337; Solana/Tron/Stellar use BlindPay.

requestBody.description: Generates a Smart Account (ERC-4337 via Notus) or BlindPay wallet address for receiving USDT or USDC. The provider is auto-selected based on the chain. WARNING: Send ONLY the specified asset on the specified network. Sending the wrong asset or using the wrong network may result in permanent loss of funds. Deposit is credited after blockchain confirmations.
